core.zh: 私有工作区结构清晰，客户端/WZ/IDB 等资产保持 local-only。
core.en: Private workspace layout is clear; client/WZ/IDB assets stay local-only.

core.zh: CInPacket / COutPacket host-side value model 已覆盖基础读写语义。
core.en: Host-side CInPacket / COutPacket value models cover basic read/write semantics.

core.zh: ZXString、ZRef hidden-result pointer 等关键 ABI 边界已记录。
core.en: Critical ABI boundaries such as ZXString and hidden-result ZRef pointers are recorded.

core.zh: 已有 socket/packet seam skeleton；raw socket、encryption、buffer lifecycle 未完整建模。
core.en: Socket/packet seam skeleton exists; raw socket, encryption, and buffer lifecycle are not fully modeled.

core.zh: SelectWorldResult、AvatarLook::Decode 有 IDA/runtime 证据；完整 login packet set 未完成。
core.en: SelectWorldResult and AvatarLook::Decode have IDA/runtime evidence; full login packet set is incomplete.

core.zh: SetField(0x008D) prefix、FILETIME tail、当前 fixture offset map 已建立。
core.en: SetField(0x008D) prefix, FILETIME tail, and current fixture offset map are established.

core.zh: local user 0x002C clean fixture 已 decode；MovePath 变体覆盖仍不足。
core.en: A clean local user 0x002C movement fixture is decoded; broader MovePath variants remain pending.

core.zh: 资源路径与 String ABI 的 root-cause 边界已缩小，但完整资源系统未重构。
core.en: Resource-path and string ABI root-cause boundaries are narrowed; full resource system reconstruction is not done.

milestones.name: Login smoke
milestones.zh: 登录链路可通过自动化 smoke。

milestones.name: Character select smoke
milestones.zh: 选人流程可进入后续 migration。
milestones.en: Character select can proceed into migration.

milestones.name: Channel migration
milestones.zh: SelectCharacter 后可切入 channel-side MigrateIn。
milestones.en: After SelectCharacter, the client reaches channel-side MigrateIn.

milestones.name: Field entry map 10000
milestones.zh: clean baseline 可见进入 tutorial map。
milestones.en: Clean baseline reaches visible tutorial map.

milestones.name: Field CRC clean baseline
milestones.zh: map 10000 的 live client CRC 与 Kinoko 对照值匹配。
milestones.en: Live client CRC for map 10000 matches the Kinoko comparison value.

milestones.name: Local user move 0x002C
milestones.zh: 已有一条 clean 112-byte movement fixture。
milestones.en: One clean 112-byte local movement fixture is decoded.

milestones.name: NPC movement 0x00F1/0x013A
milestones.zh: 已确认是 NPC movement stream，不再混入 local user move。
milestones.en: Confirmed as NPC movement stream, not local user movement.

milestones.name: Full CharacterData
milestones.zh: 当前 fixture map 较强，但完整 nested decode 未完成。
milestones.en: Current fixture map is strong, but full nested decode is not complete.

milestones.name: Full MovePath variants
milestones.zh: core body 与一个 clean sample 已验证；更多 attr/option/tail 变体待补。
milestones.en: Core body and one clean sample are validated; more attr/option/tail variants are pending.

serverData.zh: 作为当前主服务端对照与自动化测试台。
serverData.en: Current main server comparison target and automation testbed.

serverData.zh: proof map 已对齐，广域 map corpus 仍待扩展。
serverData.en: Proof maps match; broader map corpus remains pending.

serverData.zh: tuto00 正常路径和 portal CRC 已在 clean run 对齐。
serverData.en: Normal tuto00 path and portal CRC match in clean runs.

serverData.zh: 计划做 overlay/catalog，不分发 WZ。
serverData.en: Planned as overlay/catalog work; WZ files are not distributed.

serverData.zh: 计划整理 v95 服务端、WZ 工具、汉化资源的可信度目录。
serverData.en: Planned trust catalog for v95 servers, WZ tools, and localization resources.
